profile.availability.title: Mentorship availability & goals
profile.availability.desc: Pause incoming mentor requests when you're out of office, and set a soft monthly target if it helps you keep cadence.
profile.availability.available: You're currently available for mentor requests
profile.availability.returnHint: Until this date, you won't appear in mentor suggestions.
profile.availability.notePlaceholder: e.g. "Out for parental leave — back in September"
profile.goal.title: Monthly goal (optional)
profile.goal.desc: Pick a small number of mentoring sessions per month — we'll surface a soft nudge on the dashboard. Set to 0 to turn it off.
profile.career.title: Career history
profile.career.toHint: (leave empty if this is your current role)
profile.career.descPlaceholder: What did you do in this role? (optional)
profile.career.emptyOwn: Add your previous roles to improve your matches.
profile.pastMeetings.title: Past meetings
profile.pastMeetings.descPrefix: Completed mentoring sessions, both as mentor and mentee. Active sessions live on your
profile.reflection.title: Reflection log
profile.reflection.descPrefix: A short weekly check-in. Answers are read by an AI and matched to the
profile.reflection.descSuffix: of skills, then surfaced as one-click suggestions for your landscape. Only you can see this.
profile.shadow.title: A role you'd love to shadow
profile.shadow.desc: Only you can see this. We use it to surface unexpected matches over time.
profile.shadow.placeholder: If you could spend a day shadowing someone in a completely different role, what would that role look like?
profile.shadow.empty: No answer yet — even a sentence helps.
